title: Waaree Energies Subsidiary Executes PPA for 300MW Wind Project - scanx.trade
content:
Waaree Energies Subsidiary Executes PPA for 300MW Wind Project
Waaree Energies announced that its wholly-owned step-down subsidiary, Waaree Forever Energies Four Private Limited, executed a Power Purchase Agreement with SECI on May 06, 2026. The agreement covers a 300MW wind power project to be developed in Dwarka, Gujarat.
*this image is generated using AI for illustrative purposes only.
waaree energies , through its wholly-owned step-down subsidiary Waaree Forever Energies Four Private Limited, has executed a Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with the Solar Energy Corporation of India Limited (SECI). The agreement is for the development of a 300MW wind power project located in Dwarka, Gujarat. The PPA was officially executed on May 06, 2026, following an initial intimation dated February 24, 2026.
Key Details of the Agreement
The PPA between Waaree Forever Energies Four Private Limited and SECI covers a wind energy capacity of 300MW. The project site is established in Dwarka, Gujarat. The following table summarises the key parameters of the agreement:
Significance of the Development
The execution of this PPA with SECI represents a key milestone for Waaree Energies in the wind energy sector. SECI, a central public sector enterprise under the Ministry of New and Renewable Energy, plays a pivotal role in facilitating renewable energy procurement across India. The 300MW wind project in Dwarka, Gujarat, adds to the company's growing portfolio of clean energy assets through its subsidiary.
